curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. Vector 1: checkShellArgumentSafety in arguments.go was missing 'password' from the unsafe types map. Vector 2: handleShellBranch in executor.go did not block webhook-tagged requests from using shell execution, and executeAction in handler.go passed unfiltered webhook-extracted JSON arguments directly to the execution request. Three non-test source files were changed (arguments.go, executor.go, handler.go), so the patch is not noisy.
